name: Meatloaf Stuffed with Ham and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine ground sirloin, onion, mustard, tomato soup, parsley, bell pepper, eggs, bread crumbs, salt, black pepper, and garlic.
3. Mix gently until all ingredients are well incorporated.
4. Place the mixture into a greased loaf pan and shape into a loaf.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour or until the internal temperature reaches 160°F (71°C).
6. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before slicing and serving.
